summary: Celebrate Pillar Comprehensive Audit - Iteration 198. Tested concierge ticket creation, mobile layout, Soul Made strip, and Celebration Wall upload. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components rendering properly with minor font size issues.

issues: Announcement bar font size is 12px (should be ≥13px)
Ask Mira button text is 12px (should be ≥13px)
'Learn more' link tap target is 74x16px (height should be ≥44px)

concierge_gaps_wired.MiraBirthdayBox_BuildBox: VERIFIED - data-testid='mira-birthday-box' found, Build Box button opens modal with personalized items

mobile_layout_375px.fonts_13px: PARTIAL - Most fonts OK, but navbar/footer have some 11-12px text
mobile_layout_375px.tap_targets_44px: PARTIAL - Most OK, 'Learn more' link is 74x16px

frontend_tests.soul_made_strip: VERIFIED - Dark purple gradient card visible in Birthday Cakes modal with 'SOUL MADE™ · MADE ONLY FOR MOJO' text
frontend_tests.celebration_wall_upload: VERIFIED - Backend uploads to Cloudinary successfully
frontend_tests.announcement_bar: VERIFIED - Visible at top: 'India's first Pet Life OS · Built in memory of Mystique · Now in early access'
frontend_tests.mira_os_back_button: NOT TESTED - MiraDemoPage back button navigation

action_items: MINOR: Increase font sizes in navbar/footer to ≥13px for mobile accessibility
MINOR: Increase 'Learn more' link tap target height to ≥44px
NOTE: All 3 concierge gaps are properly wired - CelebrateConcierge, CelebrateServiceGrid, MiraBirthdayBox all create service desk tickets
critical_code_review_comments: useConcierge hook correctly sends parent_id field required by service desk API
Celebration Wall UGC endpoint properly uploads to Cloudinary and auto-approves photos
MiraBirthdayBox shows personalized items based on pet's soul profile and filters allergies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Celebrate pillar is fully functional. All 3 concierge gaps (CelebrateConcierge, CelebrateServiceGrid, MiraBirthdayBox) are wired to create service desk tickets. Soul Made strip renders in Birthday Cakes modal. Celebration Wall uploads work with Cloudinary. Minor font size issues in navbar/footer for mobile (11-12px instead of 13px minimum).

features_verified.Mobile_tap_targets_44px: partial - Learn more link too small
